abilities.name: Aegis
abilities.text: Once per activation. This model may reduce damage dealt to it by 1.

abilities.name: Nothing Up My Sleeve
abilities.text: At the start and end of this model's activation, it may look at the top card of its deck and may discard it.

abilities.name: Ruined Concentration
abilities.text: Enemy models within 2" increase all TNs by +1.

actions.name: Colorful Blast
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This action may target friendly models.
actions.effects: The target and models within (t)1" of the target gain a Glowy token. If this attack receives a raise, increase this (t) to 4".

triggers.name: Set Charge
triggers.text: Make a Pyrotechnic marker in base contact with the target.

actions.name: "I'm Helping!"
actions.effects: Target heals 1. For each raise this action receives, the target heals an additional +2.

triggers.name: On Your Heels
triggers.text: Place this model into base contact with the target.

actions.name: Tampering
actions.effects: Resolve the end of turn effects on the target using a suit in this action's final duel total, then remove the target.
